prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Rotrex C38-91 centrifugal supercharger (AMG M112 E32 engine code) with a custom billet aluminum pulley system (6.5" diameter) and a supporting fuel system upgrade including Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Siemens Deka 80lb/hr injectors, and a custom-tuned ECU reflash via HP Tuners targeting 12.5 psi boost for ~450 HP at the crank (stock internals retained but with ARP head studs and MLS head gaskets for reliability).

Full titanium exhaust system by Supersprint, featuring 70mm diameter piping with 304 stainless steel headers (equal-length 4-2-1 design), a 200-cell metallic core catalytic converter, and a valved rear section with dual 100mm titanium tips (weight savings of ~22 lbs over stock).

Suspension overhaul with KW Variant 3 coilovers (custom valved for the Crossfire’s unique front/rear weight distribution), paired with H&R front and rear sway bars (25mm front, 22mm rear), spherical bearing subframe bushings by 034 Motorsport, and polyurethane control arm bushings (Energy Suspension) to eliminate compliance under hard cornering.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Rocket Bunny V2 Crossfire kit (hand-laid pre-preg carbon fiber with integrated OEM-style LED turn signals), including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser with integrated brake cooling ducts.

Custom front splitter by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3" overhang with integrated canards) and a fixed carbon fiber rear wing (DTM-style, 1,200mm width, 200mm chord) mounted on billet aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle of attack (0-15 degrees).

OEM+ interior refresh with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara inserts), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede-wrapped with SRT-6 embroidery), and a custom roll cage by Autopower (6-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, bolt-in design with harness bar for Schroth 4-point harnesses).
